context: For studying or focus sessions, music should be non-distracting and calm. Best genres: study, ambient, classical, lofi. Expected moods: focused or chill. Target energy: 0.2-0.4.
Workout music needs high energy and motivation. Best genres: hip-hop, electronic, metal, edm, hard-rock. Expected moods: energetic, euphoric, or intense. Target energy: 0.75-0.95.
Sleep and relaxation music must be very low energy. Best genres: ambient, sleep, new-age, classical, acoustic. Expected moods: chill or melancholic. Target energy: 0.1-0.25.
Party and dance music should be high energy and euphoric. Best genres: dance, pop, electronic, edm, house, disco. Expected moods: euphoric, energetic, or happy. Target energy: 0.75-0.9.
Sad or melancholic music should reflect emotional depth. Best genres: sad, indie, singer-songwriter, blues, folk, soul. Expected moods: melancholic or romantic. Target energy: 0.2-0.4.
Romantic music should be warm and intimate. Best genres: r-n-b, soul, jazz, romance, latin. Expected moods: romantic or happy. Target energy: 0.4-0.6.
Road trip music should be uplifting and varied. Best genres: rock, country, pop, alternative, indie. Expected moods: happy or energetic. Target energy: 0.55-0.75.
Morning music should be upbeat without being overwhelming. Best genres: pop, indie-pop, funk, soul, reggae. Expected moods: happy or euphoric. Target energy: 0.55-0.75.
Angry or intense music should be loud and aggressive. Best genres: metal, hard-rock, punk, grunge, heavy-metal, rock. Expected moods: angry or intense. Target energy: 0.8-1.0.
Atmospheric or moody music should be layered and introspective. Best genres: ambient, trip-hop, electronic, indie. Expected moods: melancholic or chill. Target energy: 0.25-0.5.
